mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the risk-free discount rate applied to equity cash flows, directly compressing valuation multiples and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in declining rate periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid acceleration in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending earnings revisions, triggering risk-off positioning and negative equity returns over the following week.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE at 3.7% is near historical lows
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day forward returns in more than 60% of triggered instances despite the negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: When industrial production growth outpaces housing starts, it indicates a supply-demand imbalance favoring corporate earnings, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The interaction term's coefficient becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.10) in a multivariate regression over a 5-year out-of-sample period.

mechanism_narrative: In a high-rate environment, persistent inflation above target forces the Fed to maintain restrictive policy, compressing equity multiples and yielding negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive when both FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.5% and CPIAUCSL shows year-over-year acceleration.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales and consumer credit balances reflect robust aggregate demand, which translates directly into higher corporate revenues and positive short-term equity performance.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS at 511.5B indicates strong consumer spending
failure_condition: Rolling 1-year Spearman correlation between RSAFS changes and SPX 5-day returns falls below 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in industrial output below the 105 threshold signals supply-side bottlenecks resolving into demand weakness, prompting negative equity returns over the next month.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO at 108.5 is near cycle highs
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are not significantly negative when INDPRO breaches the threshold for two consecutive months.

mechanism_narrative: Strong non-farm payroll growth combined with rising federal funds rates creates a goldilocks environment where wage growth supports earnings without triggering aggressive tightening, driving positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative forward returns in more than 50% of historical instances over a 10-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: When housing starts exceed 1.3 million units, it signals sustained construction demand and consumer confidence, which historically precedes positive S&P 500 returns over the following month.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST at 1201.0 is below trigger threshold
failure_condition: Forward returns turn negative when HOUST exceeds the threshold but PAYEMS growth simultaneously decelerates by more than 0.5pp.
